title: Anuṣṭubh — pre-classical 4×8 śloka
prompt: Compose a four-pāda anuṣṭubh on the theme of *vimarśa* (reflective recognition), 32 syllables total.
constraint: anuṣṭubh chandas; 8 syllables per pāda × 4 pādas; the second hemistich must complete the first as recognition completes perception.
notes: Live cascade run for v0.4.1 (--mode live). Validator status is reported honestly; v0.4 has no chandas-aware scorer.
